name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.44: OTA revert-report. POST /revert-report (machine-key) records a kiosk auto-rollback of a crash-looping build, raises an idempotent app_revert alert, reflects the healed lower version in the fleet table, and shows a rejected-build badge in the OTA panel when a machine rejected the current target. Cumulative over v5.43.
